focused_test.result: 1 failed: DID NOT RAISE VoiceProviderUnavailable; restarted sidecar replayed the request and returned a successful transcript

direct_probe.interpretation: in-flight sidecar death was hidden by replay and owned sidecar temp remained

fix.request_lifecycle: A failed in-flight request raises its original provider_unavailable/provider_timeout error; one restart is performed only for future requests and the request body is never replayed.
fix.process_cleanup: The sidecar starts a new process group; owned group termination has bounded SIGTERM/SIGKILL cleanup.
fix.temp_cleanup: The configured temp root is passed to the sidecar and only voice-sidecar-* directories are removed during close/restart, including after process death.
fix.regression: The killed-inflight test also proves the restarted sidecar remains usable for the next request.

validation.result: 503 provider_unavailable; /api/chat 200; temp root empty before teardown

validation.command: TTS loopback ffprobe probe under VOICE_NETWORK_DENY=1
validation.result: 127.0.0.1; pcm_s16le; 16000 Hz; mono; temp root empty before and after close

cleanup_receipt.preexisting_generated_artifacts: Removed 9 prior owned .voice-tmp/voice-sidecar-* directories using the scoped SidecarManager cleanup; model cache and voice venv were preserved.
cleanup_receipt.current_probe_state: No voice-sidecar temp directories remain; no raw audio, model weights, provider request bodies, persistent URLs, or unrelated files were removed.
